# SoSkin

> SoSkin — intelligent skincare rescue powered by AI. Personalized routines, ingredient analysis, and trusted beauty guidance for consumers and beauty experts in Egypt.

SoSkin helps users diagnose skin concerns, analyze cosmetic ingredients via the camera, get AI-personalized routines, and learn through a built-in beauty academy. An Expert mode adds an in-store Sales Co-Pilot for advisors.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of SoSkin and entry to all tools.
- [Beauty Academy](/academy): Bite-sized lessons and quizzes on skincare science.
- [SOS Rescue](/sos): Instant AI guidance for urgent skin problems.
- [Ingredient Scan](/scan): Scan a product label with your camera and decode ingredients.
- [Trends](/trends): What's trending in the Egyptian beauty market.
- [Founder](/founder): About Omar Soliman and the SoSkin mission.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms for using SoSkin.
